summary: First test iteration for SignSense (Expo + FastAPI). All 4 backend pytests passed; all frontend screens load with correct testIDs. Camera UI components could not be exercised in headless web (camera permission denied, expected), but permission-prompt screen renders correctly with grant-camera-permission button.

issues: Minor: console warning 'Image: style.resizeMode is deprecated. Please use props.resizeMode' — fix by moving resizeMode from imageStyle to resizeMode prop on ImageBackground.

action_items: (Optional) Fix deprecated Image.style.resizeMode warning on onboarding hero.

Camera-screen interactive elements (capture-frame-button, tts-speak-button, flip-camera-btn, history-btn, auto-toggle, emotion-badge, recognized-text-output, camera-preview, clear-text-button) exist in source but were not reachable in headless web preview because camera permission cannot be granted. Verify manually on device / Expo Go.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: AnalyzeResponse reconstructs via AnalyzeResponse(**record, raw=...). Works (created_at already str). Consider adding request size guard for image_base64 to prevent oversized payloads.
server.py: distress is only set from model output; consider server-side augmentation (e.g., Sad/Fear + HELP gesture) for robustness.
camera.tsx: auto-analyze interval (4s) starts even while analyzing=true; captureAndAnalyze guards with `if analyzing` early-return, which is fine but may drop frames silently — acceptable.
camera.tsx: uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (correct Expo pattern); env file has the same key — OK.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of reachable screens (onboarding, camera-permission, history, settings) + all testIDs verified on reachable screens; camera-screen not reachable in headless (expected)

seed_data_creation: One recognition was created then cleared via DELETE /api/history during backend tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://asl-mood-chat.preview.emergentagent.com. Real JPEG sample used: https://images.pexels.com/photos/3760607/...  Gemini returned a valid strict JSON (emotion Happy, 0.95 conf) — analyze endpoint works end-to-end via Emergent LLM key. Camera-screen testIDs are validated only via source inspection because web headless cannot get camera permission.
